book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
That Jesus Christ shall come as a Judge.

ccel.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

title: That Jesus Christ shall come as a Judge.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That Jesus Christ shall come as a Judge.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Malachi: “Behold, the day of the Lord cometh, burning as an oven; and all the aliens and all the wicked shall be as stubble; and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith the Lord.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the forty-ninth (or fiftieth) Psalm: “God the Lord of gods hath spoken, and called the earth.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: From the rising of the sun even to the going down thereof, out of Sion is the beauty of His glory.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: God shall come manifestly, our God, and shall not keep silence.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: A fire shall burn before Him, and round about Him shall be a great storm.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: He hath called the heaven above, and the earth, that He may separate His people.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Gather together His saints unto Him, those who arrange His covenant with sacrifices.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And the heavens shall announce His righteousness, for God is the judge.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Isaiah: “The Lord God of strength shall go forth, and shall break war in pieces: He shall stir up contest, and shall cry over His enemies with strength.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: I have been silent; shall I always be silent?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the sixty-seventh Psalm: “Let God arise, and let His enemies be scattered: and let those who hate Him flee from His face.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: As smoke vanisheth, let them vanish: as wax melteth from the face of fire, thus let the sinners perish from the face of God.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And let the righteous be glad and rejoice in the sight of God: and let them be glad with joyfulness.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Sing unto God, sing praises unto His name: make a way to Him who goeth up into the west.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: God is His name.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: They shall be put to confusion from the face of Him who is the Father of the orphans, and the Judge of the widows.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: God is in His holy place: God, who maketh men to dwell with one mind in an house, bringing forth them that are bound with might, and equally those who provoke unto anger, who dwell in the sepulchres: God, when Thou wentest forth in the sight of Thy people, in passing into the desert.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the eighty-first Psalm: “Arise, O God; judge the earth: for Thou wilt exterminate among all nations.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel according to Matthew: “What have we to do with Thee, Thou Son of David? why art Thou come hither to punish us before the time?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Likewise according to John: “The Father judgeth nothing, but hath given all judgment to the Son, that all may honour the Son as they honour the Father.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: He that honoureth not the Son, honoureth not the Father who hath sent Him.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: So too in the second Epistle of Paul to the Corinthians: “We must all appear before the judgment-seat of Christ, that every one may bear the things proper to his body, according to those things which he hath done, whether they be good or evil.”
